page: Microsoft Azure HX176rs is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance belonging to the HX server family, designed for high-performance computing workloads. It features an x86_64 Intel processor with 176 dedicated vCPUs and is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 1408.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

For storage and connectivity, the HX176rs includes 4332 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. Additionally, the instance is RDMA (Remote Direct Memory Access) capable, enabling low-latency, high-throughput networking interfaces across clustered nodes. No public IPv4 addresses are bundled with this instance.

Given its massive memory capacity, high core count, and RDMA capabilities, this instance represents a high-resource density profile. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for large-scale clustered environments where inter-node communication speed and memory capacity are critical, avoiding the overhead of multiple smaller nodes. The HX176rs is suited for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale databases, high-performance computing simulations, and complex enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure HX176rs is a high-performance, memory-optimized virtual machine from the HX family, powered by an x86_64 Intel processor and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 176 dedicated vCPUs and 1408.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per vCPU memory ratio. The instance includes 4332 GB of local storage, supports Premium Storage, and is RDMA capable for low-latency networking. Designed without integrated GPUs, this server is engineered for massive resource density and high-throughput node clustering. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for large-scale deployments that require substantial memory and processing power without the overhead of multiple physical hosts. The HX176rs is suited for memory-intensive enterprise databases, high-performance computing simulations, and clustered scientific workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure HX176rs is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 176 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1408 GB of RAM, and 4332 GB of local storage. It is RDMA capable and designed for high-performance computing.

tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated processors, local storage, and low-latency RDMA networking for demanding clustered workloads.
